rationale: Both serves (count 6) and operates_on_corridor (count 9) represent a route operating on/traveling along a corridor. Representative records show identical endpoint direction: route subject → corridor object. Examples: relation_m34-serves-corridor (route_m34-sbs → corridor_34th-st-busway) and relation_rel-route-b44-sbs-serves-corridor-nostrand (route_b44-sbs → corridor_nostrand-avenue) have the same query semantics.

issues: decision_type "field_value_mapping" is not allowed for candidate category relation_kind_inventory; use relation_kind_mapping, needs_more_data, no_change

rationale: Both has_lead_entity (count 2) and has_lead_agency (count 3) represent a project having a lead entity/agency. Representative records show identical endpoint direction: project subject → entity object. Examples: relation_rel-project-has-entity-nycdot (project_jamaica-bus-improvement-study → entity_nyc-dot) and relation_project-has-entity-nycdot (project_east-161st-st-bx6-capital → entity_nyc-dot) carry the same semantics.

issues: decision_type "field_value_mapping" is not allowed for candidate category relation_kind_inventory; use relation_kind_mapping, needs_more_data, no_change

rationale: Both community_outreach (count 2) and consulted (count 2) represent a project engaging with a community board. Representative records show identical endpoint direction: project subject → community-board object. Both involve the M86 SBS project and Manhattan Community Boards 7 and 8 with identical evidence sources (m86_sbs_progress_report_2017). Payloads carry the same query semantics.
